strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js/React depth in recent roles (re:cinq, Optilyz, RIDE)
Hands-on AI agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned despite it being a primary stack item
Kotlin is absent and Java exposure appears limited to older, non-backend-service contexts
Significant career time invested in DLang, a niche outside the role's ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Recent TypeScript/Node fullstack + AI agent work
Missing Nest.js and weak Kotlin/Java coverage

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement and matches the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes) with current, directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience — a rare and explicitly required skill. Testing depth and craftsmanship practices align well with the role's quality expectations. Gaps are modest: Nest.js is unlisted (though easily learnable given the profile) and Kotlin/Java coverage is thin for the secondary stack. Overall a strong fit for a senior IC building internal automation tooling.
